code:
type OrderStatus =
  | Pending
  | Paid
  | Shipped
  | Delivered
  | Cancelled

fn name_of(_ s: OrderStatus) -> String
  match s
  when Pending
    "Pending"
  when Paid
    "Paid"
  when Shipped
    "Shipped"
  when Delivered
    "Delivered"
  when Cancelled
    "Cancelled"
  end
end

fn next(_ status: OrderStatus, _ event: String) -> OrderStatus
  if event == "cancel"
    OrderStatus.Cancelled
  else
    match status
    when Pending
      if event == "pay"
        OrderStatus.Paid
      else
        status
      end
    when Paid
      if event == "ship"
        OrderStatus.Shipped
      else
        status
      end
    when Shipped
      if event == "deliver"
        OrderStatus.Delivered
      else
        status
      end
    when Delivered
      status
    when Cancelled
      status
    end
  end
end

mut current = OrderStatus.Pending
let events = ["pay", "ship", "unknown", "deliver"]
for e in events
  current = next(current, e)
  println(name_of(current))
end
